name: mariner
description: Mariner — a GNOME Files clone built with node-gtk + TypeScript

lintExceptions.finish-args-host-filesystem-access: Mariner is a file manager; browsing and managing the whole filesystem is its core function, same as other file managers on Flathub.
lintExceptions.finish-args-flatpak-spawn-access: Open in Terminal / the location bar's !!command feature launch the user's terminal emulator on the host in the current folder — host terminals are not visible inside the sandbox.
